narrative:
Twinsburg 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 910 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.5 percentage points.
